summary: Phase 7: End-to-end round-trip test against real Postgres 17 + pgvector

resolution.note: Phase 7 complete. End-to-end round-trip verified against pgvector/pgvector:pg17 docker container: load in 0.9s, 6 tables populated, all row counts match SQLite source (11/58/58/2531/2548/6), corpus_metadata pinned to expected values, self-similarity smoke test returns distance=0 for exact match. Runbook corrections captured on 94167d50 (DATABASE_URL prereq, richer verification, HNSW emission, artifact archival).
